goals.objective: Convert JaxPlanetPolicy and JaxAttentionPlanetPolicy to the ComposablePlanetPolicy framework, update PPO to handle AutoregressivePointerDecoder outputs, set gnn_pointer as the default architecture, and verify training runs without silent failure.

checkpoints.evidence: Created active ultragoal 502bf01b for composable policy conversion, PPO autoregressive pointer support, gnn_pointer default, and training validation.

Converted JaxPlanetPolicy/JaxAttentionPlanetPolicy to ComposablePlanetPolicy wrappers; PPO rollout/update now carries sequence-shaped target/bucket/log_prob/returns/advantages for multi-launch pointer decoding; gnn_pointer is Hydra/schema/default_cfg default. Verification passed: rtk uv run --group dev pytest tests/test_jax_policy.py tests/test_jax_ppo.py tests/test_feature_registry.py -q => 25 passed; rtk uv run python scripts/generate_default_cfg.py --check => pass; tiny gnn_pointer training smoke exited successfully with update=1 steps=1 loss=-0.0052 entropy=3.440.

All requested requirements are implemented and verified. Multi-launch is preserved end-to-end: pointer decoder exposes decoded target sequences, rollout stores sequence-shaped targets/buckets/log_probs, action construction emits multiple fleet slots per source with bounded per-step ship allocation, and PPO update uses teacher-forced target sequences for autoregressive log-prob recomputation. Defaults are gnn_pointer in schema/Hydra/default_cfg. Verification: 25 focused tests passed, default_cfg --check passed, and one-update gnn_pointer training smoke completed with finite update line: update=1 steps=1 episodes=0 loss=-0.0052 entropy=3.440.

goals.objective: Get Kaggle W&B population worker (sweep 6utit9rs, H100) through bootstrap, calibration, and training start successfully.

checkpoints.evidence: v20 logging identified verify_gpu_jax_plugins failure: xla_cuda12 plugin missing after jax[cuda12] install on Kaggle. Implemented explicit uv pip install jax-cuda12-plugin jax-cuda12-pjrt step; tests pass. Launching v21.
checkpoints.note: bootstrap fix for missing cuda12 plugin wheels

checkpoints.evidence: v22 pushed (kernel version 22) with venv pip install for jax-cuda12-plugin[with-cuda], UV_PROJECT_ENVIRONMENT on all uv bootstrap steps, and pip-list diagnostics on verify failure. Tests: 23 passed in test_kaggle_jax_backend + test_kaggle_wandb_population.
checkpoints.note: Launching v22 after v21 verify_gpu_jax_plugins failure (plugins missing in .venv)

checkpoints.evidence: v26 Kaggle log synced via file-pattern showed verify_gpu_jax_plugins failed after uv_pip_install_jax_cuda12_stack because xla_cuda12 imported stale jax_cuda13_plugin.cuda_plugin_extension and JAX version detection reported system jax 0.7.2. Patched src/orchestration/kaggle_jax.py so all uv pip show/list/install/uninstall operations target .venv/bin/python. Focused verification passed: rtk uv run --group dev pytest tests/test_kaggle_jax_backend.py tests/test_kaggle_wandb_population.py -m "not slow and not jax" => 23 passed. make test-fast still has unrelated baseline failures (e.g. candidate_count expected 4 vs resolved 8).
checkpoints.note: v26 failure diagnosed; venv-targeted uv pip bootstrap fix implemented

checkpoints.evidence: Rendered worker package verified to omit raw WANDB_API_KEY and include only WANDB_API_KEY_SECRET_NAME=WANDB_API_KEY. Pushed Kaggle kernel jonduea/orbit-wars-w-b-population-worker version 27 on NvidiaH100 with sweep 6utit9rs, sweep YAML conf/sweeps/wandb/kaggle_population_long.yaml, and timeout 43200 seconds.
checkpoints.note: v27 launched with venv-targeted JAX bootstrap and no packaged W&B key

checkpoints.evidence: After removing the rejected standalone/no-W&B fallback, focused tests passed: rtk uv run --group dev pytest tests/test_kaggle_jax_backend.py tests/test_kaggle_wandb_population.py -m "not slow and not jax" => 25 passed. Re-rendered package verified worker-env omits raw WANDB_API_KEY and contains WANDB_API_KEY_SECRET_NAME=WANDB_API_KEY; package contains no standalone fallback strings. Pushed Kaggle kernel jonduea/orbit-wars-w-b-population-worker version 28 on NvidiaH100 with sweep 6utit9rs and timeout 43200 seconds.
checkpoints.note: v28 launched after user fixed Kaggle WANDB_API_KEY secret

checkpoints.evidence: v28 remained Kaggle RUNNING but produced no logs and no W&B run after repeated checks, consistent with long/silent bootstrap. Implemented package-only bootstrap optimization: Nvidia Kaggle packages rewrite pyproject jax[cuda13] dependency to plain jax and omit stale uv.lock so the worker avoids installing CUDA13 before explicit CUDA12 stack setup. Focused tests passed: rtk uv run --group dev pytest tests/test_kaggle_jax_backend.py tests/test_kaggle_wandb_population.py -m "not slow and not jax" => 26 passed. Rendered package verified no raw WANDB_API_KEY, WANDB_API_KEY_SECRET_NAME=WANDB_API_KEY, no jax[cuda13] in rendered pyproject, no uv.lock, no rejected fallback strings. Pushed Kaggle kernel version 29 on NvidiaH100 for sweep 6utit9rs.
checkpoints.note: v29 launched with optimized Kaggle GPU dependency package

checkpoints.evidence: Added bootstrap progress prints for Kaggle dependency setup and changed uv sync to uv sync --no-dev. Focused verification passed: rtk uv run --group dev pytest tests/test_kaggle_jax_backend.py tests/test_kaggle_wandb_population.py -m "not slow and not jax" => 26 passed. Rendered package verified no raw WANDB_API_KEY, WANDB_API_KEY_SECRET_NAME=WANDB_API_KEY, no jax[cuda13] in rendered pyproject, no uv.lock, and bootstrap progress marker present. Pushed Kaggle kernel version 30 on NvidiaH100 for sweep 6utit9rs.
checkpoints.note: v30 launched with visible bootstrap and no-dev dependency sync

checkpoints.evidence: Added CUDA12 NVIDIA runtime package installation after version-aligned JAX CUDA12 plugin install in src/orchestration/kaggle_jax.py; focused tests passed: rtk uv run --group dev pytest tests/test_kaggle_jax_backend.py tests/test_kaggle_wandb_population.py -m "not slow and not jax" -> 27 passed, 1 warning.
checkpoints.note: Kaggle GPU bootstrap fix verified locally

checkpoints.evidence: Rendered Kaggle package verified: no raw WANDB_API_KEY, WANDB_API_KEY_SECRET_NAME=WANDB_API_KEY, no jax[cuda13] in pyproject, no uv.lock, and new uv_pip_install_cuda12_runtime bootstrap marker with nvidia-cusparse-cu12 included. Pushed Kaggle kernel jonduea/orbit-wars-w-b-population-worker version 31 on NvidiaH100, sweep 6utit9rs, timeout 43200 seconds.

checkpoints.evidence: After user noted Kaggle variable/output persistence may be enabled, changed worker bootstrap so ORBIT_WARS_WORKER_VENV defaults to /tmp/orbit_wars_worker_venv in the packaged environment while local default remains .venv. Focused tests passed: rtk uv run --group dev pytest tests/test_kaggle_jax_backend.py tests/test_kaggle_wandb_population.py -m "not slow and not jax" -> 27 passed, 1 warning. Rendered package verified no raw WANDB_API_KEY, ORBIT_WARS_WORKER_VENV=/tmp/orbit_wars_worker_venv, no jax[cuda13], no uv.lock, and CUDA12 runtime bootstrap present.
